title: cryanthemum trilobatum
intro: Cryanthemum trilobatum, also known as the three-lobed chrysanthemum or three-lobed daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and muscle spasms, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Cryanthemum trilobatum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
